category.scope_note: Industrial AC motor comparison for China exports to the Philippines, focused on PNS/IEC 60034, DOE energy efficiency, BPS/DTI PS Mark or ICC market access, safety, EMC, and 60 Hz compatibility.

target_market_label.zh: 菲律宾（PNS / 能源部 / BPS）
target_market_label.zht: 菲律賓（PNS / 能源部 / BPS）

title.en: China-to-Philippines Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of China industrial AC motor documentation against Philippines PNS/IEC 60034, DOE IE2 minimum efficiency, BPS/DTI PS Mark or ICC import controls, and 60 Hz grid compatibility expectations.
description.zh: 中国工业交流电动机文件与菲律宾 PNS/IEC 60034、能源部 IE2 最低能效、BPS/DTI PS 标志或 ICC 进口管制以及 60 Hz 电网兼容要求的信息性对照。
description.zht: 中國工業交流電動機文件與菲律賓 PNS/IEC 60034、能源部 IE2 最低能效、BPS/DTI PS 標誌或 ICC 進口管制以及 60 Hz 電網兼容要求的資訊性對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DOE energy-efficiency approval, BPS/DTI PS Mark or ICC approval, customs determination, NTC approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Philippines PNS, DOE, BPS, DTI, NTC, customs, and buyer requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、能源部能效批准、BPS/DTI PS 标志或 ICC 批准、海关裁定、NTC 批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或销售前应与合格专业人士核验现行菲律宾 PNS、能源部、BPS、DTI、NTC、海关及买方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、能源部能效批准、BPS/DTI PS 標誌或 ICC 批准、海關裁定、NTC 批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓 PNS、能源部、BPS、DTI、NTC、海關及買方要求。

answer_first.en: For covered three-phase industrial AC motors, the Philippines gap is usually not only IE class: DOE IE2 minimum, BPS/DTI PS Mark or ICC import clearance, PNS/IEC 60034 evidence, and true 60 Hz design must be confirmed. China 50 Hz motors should be treated as not directly compatible without 60 Hz rating and validation.
answer_first.zh: 对覆盖范围内的三相工业交流电动机，菲律宾差距通常不只是 IE 等级：必须确认能源部 IE2 最低能效、BPS/DTI PS 标志或 ICC 进口清关、PNS/IEC 60034 依据以及真实 60 Hz 设计。中国 50 Hz 电机如无 60 Hz 额定值和验证，不应视为可直接兼容。
answer_first.zht: 對覆蓋範圍內的三相工業交流電動機，菲律賓差距通常不只是 IE 等級：必須確認能源部 IE2 最低能效、BPS/DTI PS 標誌或 ICC 進口清關、PNS/IEC 60034 依據以及真實 60 Hz 設計。中國 50 Hz 電機如無 60 Hz 額定值和驗證，不應視為可直接兼容。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Source refresh and human legal or certification review required before treating this dataset as verified.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must remain source-linked with publisher, official URL, access date, and verified flag; target-market content must be rewritten for the Philippines and not copied from other market datasets.
